items.localizedExplanation: raises or lowers video and trackpoint speeds for selected segments.
items.explanation: raises or lowers video and trackpoint speeds for selected segments.
items.name: The Speed Editor

items.localizedExplanation: shows the start, finish and length of the video segment to which the speed adjustment will be applied.
items.explanation: shows the start, finish and length of the video segment to which the speed adjustment will be applied.
items.name: The Range Label

items.localizedExplanation: lists the speed adjustments you have applied.
items.explanation: lists the speed adjustments you have applied.
items.name: The Table View

items.localizedExplanation: adds a new speed adjustment to the list.
items.explanation: adds a new speed adjustment to the list.
items.name: The Add Button

items.localizedExplanation: shows the first, middle, and last video frames to which the speed adjustment will be applied.
items.explanation: shows the first, middle, and last video frames to which the speed adjustment will be applied.
items.name: The Frame Preview

items.localizedExplanation: shows how your route changes elevation. Colors signal the gradient of the slope. Click to select a trackpoint, ⇧-click to select a range.
items.explanation: shows how your route changes elevation. Colors signal the gradient of the slope. Click to select a trackpoint, ⇧-click to select a range.
items.name: The Elevation Chart

items.localizedExplanation: sets whether the speed will be adjusted up or down.
items.explanation: sets whether the speed will be adjusted up or down.
items.name: The Direction Control

items.localizedExplanation: sets the factor for speed adjustment. 2x down slows 120 fps video to 60 fps video, adjusting trackpoint times to match.
items.explanation: sets the factor for speed adjustment. 2x down slows 120 fps video to 60 fps video, adjusting trackpoint times to match.
items.name: The Factor Control

items.localizedExplanation: discards the changes you made and quits the Speed Editor.
items.explanation: discards the changes you made and quits the Speed Editor.
items.name: The Cancel button

items.localizedExplanation: saves any changes you made and quits the Speed Editor.
items.explanation: saves any changes you made and quits the Speed Editor.
items.name: The Apply/Confirm Changes button
